🖨️ Cheque Printing

Select Company → Bank Account → Cheque Book. Template and next number load automatically.

1 Company, Bank & Cheque Book
Select company first
Select bank account first
2 Cheque Details
Validated against selected cheque book
⚠️ Optional, but recommended for future database tracking and report matching.
3 A4 Printer Feed & Alignment Canon A4 Ready
📌 Insert the real cheque leaf in A4 portrait tray with date side first. Default position centres a 185mm × 82mm cheque on the A4 page. Use small +/− changes after one test print.
Use ROTATED 90° when the cheque leaf enters the printer date-side first and output must match your current office print.
Default 12.5mm = horizontal centre
Recommended 51.5mm = rotated preview starts at top of A4 · centre is 107.5mm
Fine rotation only. Feed mode already handles 90° rotation.
Keep browser print scale 100 also.
👁Live Cheque Preview
💡 Template auto-loads from bank account. Select company → bank → book.

📦 Supplier Empty Cheques

Print blank/empty cheques for suppliers and keep a separate tracking register.

💡 Supplier empty cheques are not part of the normal Issue Workflow. They are recorded separately as supplier blank cheque prints, with company, bank account, cheque range, receiver/supplier and print status.

📤 Bulk Cheque Print Upload

Upload finance department payment Excel/CSV, validate rows, tick selected cheques, then print by queue.

📂1. Upload Filled Excel / CSVExcel DB Dropdown Template
Upload the filled Excel template. Expected columns: Company, Bank Account, Cheque Date, Payee Name, Amount, Cheque No, Crossing, Remark.
Download the template first. Company → Bank Account → Crossing dropdowns are inside Excel and generated from live Supabase data. No default selection is needed in this upload screen.
💡 Correct workflow: click Download Excel Template with DB Dropdowns, let finance select Company / Bank Account / Cheque Book Ref / Crossing inside Excel only, then upload that file here. The app only validates and queues the uploaded cheques for printing.
Sample columns: Company | Bank Account | Cheque Date | Payee Name | Amount | Cheque No | Crossing | Remark
🧾2. Validate, Edit & Select Cheques0 selected

📒4. Cheque Book Leaf Tracking from Bulk PrintBook-wise audit
Each uploaded cheque row is linked to a cheque book by Cheque Book Ref or auto-detected from the cheque number range. After printing, book used/printed leaves update and receiver collection details appear after Issue Workflow.

👥 Users & Access

🎨 Print Template Editor

Adjust every cheque field position with − + buttons. Live canvas preview updates instantly. X/Y values are mm from LEFT and TOP of cheque surface.

TEMPLATE: BANK: DATE FORMAT: FEED MODE:
A4 A4 Printer Feed & Alignment — Real Top Position Synced with Cheque Printing
📌 These settings are the same as Cheque Printing > A4 Printer Feed & Alignment. Change here and it will update cheque printing also. For your current template preview, Top Offset 51.5mm removes the blank top space and places the rotated cheque area at the top of the A4 page.
Use ROTATED 90° when the cheque leaf enters the printer date-side first.
Default 12.5mm = horizontal centre
Recommended 51.5mm = rotated preview starts at top of A4 · centre is 107.5mm
Fine rotation only. Feed mode already handles 90° rotation.
Keep Chrome print scale 100 also.

⚙️ Field Positions (mm)

Use − + to nudge 1 mm · or type exact value

HNB fields corrected: crossing top-left, amount/words separated.

Date Font Sizept
All Digits Y Offsetmm
How this date control works:
The cheque prints date as 8 spaces. For 25 07 26, the app prints D1 D2 M1 M2, leaves the bank printed 20 area blank, then prints Y1 Y2. First move the full row using Date Cage X/Y. Keep width near 50mm. Use the small X/Y boxes only when one digit is slightly out of its box.
D1D2M1M2Bank 2Bank 0Y1Y2
D1day 1
D2day 2
M1month 1
M2month 2
20Ablank/ref
20Bblank/ref
Y1year 1
Y2year 2

🖋️ Digital Scan Signature Print
Upload a small transparent PNG/JPG scan signature. Click Upload Signature to Supabase to save the real image in Supabase Storage bucket cheque-signatures. Template position/settings are saved in Supabase system_settings. Turn off the toggle anytime to stop printing the image.
Best: transparent PNG, cropped close to signature, under 300KB.

❓ Quick Help — v2
Phase 1 — Full frontend UI with live template editor and 5 themes.
🎨 Print Template Editor:
Go to Print Templates. Select a template, use − + buttons to nudge any field position. Canvas updates live. Save when done.
🏦 Bank Account → Template:
In Bank Accounts → Edit, assign a print template to each bank account. The correct template loads automatically when printing.
🎨 Themes:
Use the 5 colour dots in the top bar, or go to Settings → Appearance. Preference is saved in browser.
🔄 Workflow rule:
Always TICK checkboxes before Transfer / Accept / Issue. Highlighted row alone does NOT process.

Logo and favicon are saved to system_settings when Supabase is connected. Local fallback is also kept for offline testing.

🛡 Production Protection
This blocks normal user right-click, View Source and common DevTools shortcut keys. Browser source code cannot be 100% hidden, but this prevents casual access.

Enable production protection

Disable right click, Ctrl+U, F12, Ctrl+Shift+I/J/C and Ctrl+S.

Protection: Off
